creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

grpc added pkgconfig file generation when built with cmake in the 1.25.0 release: https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases/tag/v1.25.0

Can we get this port updated to at least that version? I'd like to add GRPC support for audio/murmur but it requires grpc be discoverable via pkgconfig.


Thanks!
